title: senecio condylus
intro: Senecio condylus, also known as Ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Senecio condylus has been used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal purposes, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
